/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/modbus_master_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/src/ui/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/src/ui/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/src/ui/mainwindow_slots.cpp.o CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/src/backend/src/modbus.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/src/backend/src/platform.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/src/backend/src/config.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/src/backend/src/app_logger.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/src/backend/src/data_logger.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/src/backend/src/packet_monitor.c.o CMakeFiles/modbus_master.dir/modbus_master_autogen/DOHTCAYJZN/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o modbus_master  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 -lpthread -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
